about.name: Kevin Oluda
about.title: Software Developer
bio: Frontend‑focused Software Engineer with strong experience building modern, high‑performance web applications using React, TypeScript, and JavaScript. Proven ability to translate UI/UX designs into clean, scalable, and accessible interfaces while collaborating closely with backend teams using Node.js and Python (Flask).

Experienced across startups, freelancing, and agency environments, delivering production‑ready solutions, leading small teams, and integrating AI‑driven workflows. Passionate about frontend architecture, reusable components, and user‑centric design.

services.title: Automations
services.description: Professional development of APIs, bots and scripts for various functionalities and platforms.

services.description: High-quality development of sites at the professional level.

services.title: Web design
services.description: The most modern and high-quality figma and wordpress design made at a professional level.

services.title: Technical Writing
services.description: I write insightful programming articles on medium at a professional level.

education.title: Certificate – Full‑Stack Software Engineering
education.description: ALX Africa Full-Stack Software Engineering program. Comprehensive training in software development including full-stack web development, data structures, algorithms, and software engineering best practices.

education.title: Certificate – Software Development
education.description: Moringa School intensive software development bootcamp. Mastered full-stack web development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Flask, and database design.

experience.title: Technical Writer
experience.description: Creating technical documentation and guides for software development topics. Specializing in API documentation, tutorials, and developer guides. Sharing knowledge through self-published content and industry publications.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Escrow Courier Limited (On-site). Developed and maintained responsive web applications using React and modern JavaScript frameworks. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement features and optimize user experience for e-commerce platform.

experience.title: AI Agent Developer
experience.description: Tublian (Remote, Part-time). Developed AI agents and autonomous systems using LLMs and agent frameworks. Implemented prompt engineering, fine-tuning, and integration of AI models into production applications.

experience.title: Lead Software Developer
experience.description: Collark Designers (On-site). Leading software development projects and mentoring junior developers. Architecting scalable solutions and implementing best practices in code quality and project management.

experience.title: Web Developer Freelance
experience.description: Fiverr (Remote). Built custom websites and web applications for diverse clients. Specialized in React, responsive design, and full-stack development. Achieved high client satisfaction ratings with over 50+ successful projects.

experience.title: Administrative & Technical Assistant
experience.description: Freelance (Remote). Provided technical support, administrative assistance, and data management. Handled client communication, documentation, and technical troubleshooting across multiple projects.

servicesPage.intro: Building high-performance web systems for growth. From scalable frontend architecture to AI-powered applications, I help businesses ship reliable and future-ready software.

blog.title: A Guide to NextAuth, Router Prefixes & Secure User Routing
blog.excerpt: This is a practical, developer-focused how-to article to help you avoid the gotchas and ship a secure, scalable auth setup.

blog.title: How to Build a Chrome Extension
blog.alt: how to build a chrome extension
blog.excerpt: Building a Chrome extension involves creating a small software program that runs in the Google Chrome browser to extend its functionality or enhance the user's experience.

blog.title: How to Dual-Boot Windows with Ubuntu: A Step-by-Step Guide
blog.excerpt: Dual-booting Windows and Ubuntu allows you to leverage the strengths of both operating systems on a single machine. This guide provides a comprehensive, step-by-step approach to setting up a dual-boot system.

blog.title: Advanced Features for Flask RBAC Implementation
blog.excerpt: an expanded section on Error Handling and Advanced Role Structures to enhance the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) implementation in Flask.

blog.title: Scaling Flask-SocketIO Applications
blog.excerpt: Scaling and securing real-time Flask-SocketIO applications requires thoughtful implementation of tools like Redis, NGINX, HTTPS, JWT, and rate limiting

blog.title: Real-Time Data Streaming with Flask and Socket.IO
blog.excerpt: Unlike traditional HTTP requests, where the client initiates a request and the server responds, WebSockets enable bi-directional communication, making it possible to push updates from the server to the client as they happen.

blog.title: Getting Started with React
blog.excerpt: React is one of the most popular JavaScript libraries for building user interfaces. Known for its flexibility and powerful features, React makes it easy to create interactive web applications.

blog.title: Implementing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
blog.excerpt: In this article, we'll go over how to implement RBAC in a Flask application, using basic authentication, user roles, and access control decorators.

blog.title: Implementing Flask Security Best Practices
blog.excerpt: This article will cover several best practices to help you secure your Flask application, including preventing SQL injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF), and other security measures.

blog.title: Organizing your Flask Application with Blueprints
blog.excerpt: managing the increasing number of routes and modules can become cumbersome. Flask Blueprints offers a way to organize your application into modular components, improving maintainability and scalability.

blog.title: Integrating Flask with React
blog.excerpt: In this tutorial, we'll explore how to integrate a Flask backend with a React frontend. This combination leverages Flask's simplicity and React's dynamic UI capabilities to build a full-stack web application.

blog.title: Using Flask with SQLAlchemy for Database Integration
blog.excerpt: In this article, we'll explore how to integrate a database into a Flask application using SQLAlchemy. SQLAlchemy is a powerful SQL toolkit and Object-Relational Mapping (ORM) library for Python that makes database interactions much easier.

blog.title: Building REST APIs with Flask
blog.excerpt: This tutorial will create a simple REST API using Flask, a lightweight and popular Python web framework. By the end of this article, you'll have a basic understanding of how to build and run a REST API.

blog.title: From URL to Content
blog.excerpt: The journey of a web request involves a series of intricate steps that seamlessly occur in the background to deliver the content you requested.

blog.title: Empowering Mothers Through Digital Maternal Healthcare
blog.excerpt: this cutting-edge platform seeks to modernize antenatal care processes, offering seamless access to information and empowerment through timely reminders and comprehensive record-keeping.
